input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML, JSON, TOML, or HOCON, but those formats require optional hoplite-* parser modules; they are not required for hoplite-core coverage and should not be added unless tests intentionally target those modules.

Hoplite 3 applies EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource by default, so tests using ConfigLoaderBuilder.default() may see ambient CI environment variables; deterministic tests can avoid this by using explicit property sources or an empty builder.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core is a pure Kotlin configuration library; the resolved artifact only needs its normal transitive Kotlin/coroutines dependencies, and meaningful coverage is reachable with built-in MapPropertySource or Java properties without Docker, extra Maven modules, or required environment/system properties.
